nasb.text: Aaron’s son Eleazar married one of the daughters of Putiel, and she bore him Phinehas. These are the heads of the fathers’ households of the Levites according to their families.

esv.text: Eleazar, Aaron’s son, took as his wife one of the daughters of Putiel, and she bore him Phinehas. These are the heads of the fathers’ houses of the Levites by their clans.

cnv.text: 亞倫的兒子以利亞撒娶了普鐵的一個女兒為妻；她給以利亞撒生了非尼哈。按照他們的家族，這些就是利未人的各首領。

ccb.text: 亚伦的儿子以利亚撒与普铁的一个女儿结婚，生了非尼哈。以上是利未各宗族的族长。
